# Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes. Focus on the What and Why.

## Architecture & Standards Checklist
Verify your code adheres to our project manifesto:

- [ ] The Stepdown Rule: Does the code read as a top-down narrative?
- [ ] Function Size: Are all new functions < 20 lines (target 10)?
- [ ] No Magic Values: Are all literals replaced with named constants that explain the "why"?
- [ ] Helper Logic: Have all if conditional paths longer than 2 lines been moved to a helper function?

- [ ] Boolean Prefixing: Do all new flags use is/has/should (e.g., isPressed, hasData)?
- [ ] Abstraction: Are storage/implementation details hidden from the top-level logic?

## Testing Impact
How did you verify these changes? (Unit test, manual verification, logs?)

Attach photo of related Logs (if applicable):

## Visuals (Optional)
If this affects the UI or serial output, add a screenshot or log snippet here.
